name: sandcastle-afk
description: An opinionated, forge-agnostic AFK-developer loop on top of @ai-hero/sandcastle: file an agent-ready issue, an agent implements it with TDD, opens a PR/MR, an independent reviewer approves, it merges. GitHub and GitLab.

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test .sandcastle/*.test.ts && for t in .sandcastle/*.contract.test.sh; do bash "$t" || exit 1; done
